name: Filter Control in Shopify Using Metafield
body:
[{"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#1. Use Case"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/0VZLLGIHVS7I/a5f39a7-filters.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/0VZLLGIHVS7I/a5f39a7-filters.png", "name": "a5f39a7-Filters.png", "type": "image/png", "size": 1034566, "width": 1646, "height": 1133, "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "mediaID": 502, "dateInserted": "2025-09-18T18:46:40+00:00", "insertUserID": 1178, "foreignType": "embed", "foreignID": "1178", "embedType": "image"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using filters is a great way to ease navigation for your shoppers. With Merchandising Cloud, you can add filters easily using Variant Options, Metafields, or Tags. Read more here."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Within the Merchandising Cloud Merchant "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://dashboard.findify.io/", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Dashboard"}]}, {"text": " you can easily toggle filters on/off, change names, and alter the order of filters. By default, Merchandising Cloud’s filters are dynamic and disappear if there aren't any values for the viewed search query/collection, but there are also cases when you want to control the order of filters on individual collections."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Working with Merchandising Cloud’s DevTools, you can easily customize the order of filters shown, while this guide outlines a simple and non-technical method of control the experience on an ongoing basis (without having to change any code)."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#2. Input Format"}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "👍 Populated data only required for collections that should be altered"}]}, {"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "This function is designed to offer control of individual collections without having to populate data for all collections. This function will only affect collections where this metafield is populated. Where it's left empty, all filters activated in the Merchandising Cloud dashboard will be presented in order specified within the dashboard."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The function follows a really simple format, controlling: i) Which Filters to be included; and ii) In what order they should be presented."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Format:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Format{"Filter Name": Position," Filter Name_2" : Position_2 , " Filter Name_n" : Position_n }"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Example:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Example{"Discount" : 1," Color" : 2 , " Price" : 3}"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this case, the filters will be presented in the order of:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Discount", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "**Color **"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "**Price **"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "While any other filter, such as "}, {"text": "Category", "bold": true}, {"text": ", will be excluded."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#3. Requirements To Apply This Guide"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "This guide is applicable for Shopify only."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "This integration requires the merchant to set up the field and populate the data needed for Filter Control using metafields."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "This solution is built for individual collection control. Bulk management can, however, be utilized by bulk editing the input values within metafields."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#4. Time Estimates"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set up in Shopify:", "bold": true}, {"text": " 1 hour"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "**Integration: ** 1 hour"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Styling:", "bold": true}, {"text": " n/a"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Populating Filter Values:", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Depends on breath of scope. Each collection will take a few seconds.", "italic": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#5. Overview Of Integration Steps"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Step 1: Set Up Required Metafield Structure (Merchant) Step 2: Populate Data to Control the Filters per Collection Step 3: Make The Data Available Step 4: Integrate Front End Activation Through Merchandising Cloud DevTools"}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Step 1: Set Up Required Metafield Structure (Merchant)"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In order to manage metafields in Shopify, you need the capability in place. For this overview, we have utilized the 'Custom Fields' app."}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "👍 Choice of Meta Fields App"}]}, {"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "The following guide is done using the 'Custom Fields' app but meta fields are stored in Shopify so please use the meta fields app you prefer. In 'components/search/DesktopFacets/view.tsx' you need to add 'sortFacets' function and 'enhancer'."}]}]}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "components/search/DesktopFacets/view.tsx/** * @module components /search/DesktopFacets */import React from 'react';import Branch from 'components/common/Branch';import MapArray from 'components/common/MapArray';import Facet from 'components/Facet';import Sticky from 'components/common/Sticky';import Text from 'components/Text';import Button from 'components/Button';import Icon from 'components/Icon';import { classNames } from 'classnames';import * as titles from 'components/search/DesktopFacets/Title';import { MJSConfiguration, ThemedSFCProps, IFacet, MJSValue } from 'types';import { List, Map } from 'immutable';import {withPropsOnChange} from 'recompose'; //import withPropsOnChangeconst DefaultContent = ({ theme, children, config, title }) =>
{children}
/** Props that DesktopFacets view accepts */export interface IDesktopFacetsProps extends ThemedSFCProps { /** MJS Configuration */ config: MJSConfiguration; /** Facets list */ facets: List; /** Method called to reset facets */ onReset: () => any; /** MJS API Response Metadata */ meta: Map; /** Method to hide facets */ hideFacets: () => any; /** Shows visibility status of facets */ visible: boolean;}// create sortFacets to sort facetsconst sortFacets = (facets, config) => { const sorting = document.querySelector('.Merchandising Cloud-filter-sorting script') ? JSON.parse(document.querySelector('.findify-filter-sorting script').text) : false; if(sorting){ return facets.sort( (a, b) => { let x = 100000, y = 100000; const first = config.getIn(['facets', 'labels', a.get('name')], a.get('name')).toLowerCase(); const second = config.getIn(['facets', 'labels', b.get('name')], b.get('name')).toLowerCase(); if (sorting[first]){ x = sorting[first]; } if (sorting[second]){ y = sorting[second]; } return x - y; }) } return facets;} //create enhancer to change facets positions and to get json from shopifyconst enhancer = withPropsOnChange(['facets'], ({ facets, config }) => ({ facets: sortFacets(facets, config), facetsJSON: document.querySelector('.findify-filter-sorting script') ? JSON.parse(document.querySelector('.findify-filter-sorting script').text) : false}))const DesktopFacetsView: React.SFC = ({ config, facets, theme, onReset, meta, hideFacets, visible, facetsJSON}: IDesktopFacetsProps) => i.get('name')} />export default enhancer(DesktopFacetsView);", "code": true}]}], "lang": "lua"}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "components/search/DesktopFacets/index.tsx for MJS 7/** * @module components /search/DesktopFacets */import Branch from 'components/common/Branch';import MapArray from 'components/common/MapArray';import Facet from 'components/Facet';import Sticky from 'components/common/Sticky';import Title from 'components/search/DesktopFacets/Title';import Breadcrumbs from 'components/Breadcrumbs';import { useFacets } from '@findify /react-connect';import { Immutable } from '@findify /store-configuration';import { memo, useCallback, useMemo, useState } from 'react';import useTranslations from 'helpers/useTranslations';import { useEvents, emit } from 'helpers/emmiter';import styles from 'components/search/DesktopFacets/styles.css';const DefaultContent = ({ theme, children, title }) => (
{children}
);export default memo(({ theme = styles }) => { const { facets, meta, onReset, config } = useFacets(); const translate = useTranslations(); const [isHorizontal, isHidable, isSticky, isAccordion] = useMemo( () => [ config.getIn(['facets', 'position']) === 'top', config.getIn(['facets', 'hidable']), config.getIn(['facets', 'sticky']), config.getIn(['facets', 'accordion']), ], [] ); const [visible, setVisible] = useState(true); /** Generate initial list of opened facets */ const [openFacets, setFacetsStates] = useState( config .getIn(['facets', 'filters']) .filter((f) => !f.get('initiallyCollapsed')) .keySeq() .toArray() ", "code": true}]}], "lang": "javascript"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Then, you need to remove filters that are not included in json.
